# Dikshant Yadav

Frontend Developer, React Developer, Next.js Developer, UI/UX Designer and Electrical Engineering Graduate based in Delhi, India.

## Sites

- Portfolio: https://www.dikshantyadav.in
- Projects & Case Studies: https://work.dikshantyadav.in
- Blog & Articles: https://post.dikshantyadav.in

## About

Dikshant Yadav is a creative frontend developer specializing in React, Next.js, and modern web technologies. He builds immersive digital experiences combining design and development.

## Skills

- React.js, Next.js, JavaScript, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Three.js
- UI/UX Design, Responsive Design
- Node.js, Fastify, Prisma, PostgreSQL
